title: Sweetness In Sacrifice.
content:
'Tis not greatness they require
    To be offer'd up by fire;
    But 'tis sweetness that doth please
    Those Eternal Essences.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Sweetness In Sacrifice."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
